title: Adventurer's GUI
description: This pack is revamps the vanilla guis of Minecraft to give them a realistic adventure theme.
body:
# Adventurer's GUI

**Pack maintaining is paused until further notice. A complete revamp is under way.**

This texture pack revamps the vanilla guis of Minecraft to give them a realistic adventure theme.

**This is a still a work in progress, reviews and suggestions are welcome!**

To report issues or make suggestions, contact me via my Discord : @redcarlos

 
##### If you were to use some of the textures in another pack, please give credit and provide a link to this Modrinth page.
